overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player moves from a covered walkway with red neon lighting into an open plaza featuring a distinctive cylindrical building with rainbow neon rings, then continues under an overpass and down city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with corporate building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk approaching a covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: Dark corporate building with illuminated red signage and glass facade
Entrance to covered pedestrian walkway with overhead concrete structure
Large illuminated advertising screen on distant building
Street infrastructure with signal lights at intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a street corner in a futuristic city at night. A large corporate building with red signage dominates the left side while the camera approaches a covered walkway entrance. The street is relatively empty with sparse traffic visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red neon lighting

events.description: pedestrian with green hair passes close to camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway illuminated by red neon ceiling lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and tank top walking past camera in opposite direction

entered.detail: Overhead concrete structure with red neon strip lighting along the ceiling
Bright red fluorescent tube lighting creating ambient red glow
Metal and concrete seating along the walkway wall
Blue illuminated medical corporate signage on building wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered walkway bathed in red neon light. The ceiling features glowing red strips while benches line the left wall. A pedestrian with distinctive green hair passes by closely on the left. Medical corporate signage is visible on the walls as the walkway continues straight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with cylindrical landmark building

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza area with cylindrical building visible
lighting shifts from enclosed red neon to open mixed neon and ambient night light

agents.ego_description: walking across open plaza toward the cylindrical rainbow-lit building

entered.detail: Tall cylindrical skyscraper with horizontal rainbow-colored neon rings
Wide pedestrian area with geometric orange pavement patterns
Large illuminated advertisement for carbonated beverage brand
Teal and orange elevated walkway structure with staircase

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a striking cylindrical building wrapped in rainbow neon rings. The ground features distinctive orange geometric patterns. Large digital billboards and advertisements line the plaza as the camera moves toward the center of the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area under elevated overpass structure

events.description: slight left turn to navigate under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and continuing along the street

entered.detail: Elevated teal and orange metal bridge with support beams overhead
Staircase and ramp structure leading to upper pedestrian level
Small illuminated kiosk with vendor on the sidewalk
Tropical palm trees in urban planters along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a large teal and orange overpass structure, passing a street vendor stall and palm trees on the left. The cylindrical rainbow building remains visible to the left while the path continues under the elevated walkway. The environment transitions from open plaza to a more enclosed street-level space.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the city street past palm trees and commercial buildings

entered.detail: Illuminated yellow walk signal sign hanging over street
Multi-story commercial structures with illuminated windows
Tall lampposts illuminating the sidewalk and street

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overpass, the camera continues along a city street lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. The cylindrical rainbow building is now behind, and the path stretches forward between urban structures with illuminated signage and street lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a corporate street corner through a neon-lit corridor and into a vibrant urban plaza. It begins at a quiet intersection dominated by a red corporate building before the camera glides into a covered walkway bathed in glowing red neon strips and medical signage. As the camera exits the tunnel, the environment opens into a wide plaza featuring orange geometric ground patterns and a massive cylindrical building wrapped in rainbow neon rings. The scene then shifts as the camera moves beneath a teal and orange overpass, passing a street vendor and palm trees while the open plaza transitions back into an enclosed street-level space. Finally, the path continues along a city street lined with commercial buildings and illuminated signage, leaving the rainbow tower behind in the distance.
